    17→	"github.com/go-chi/httprate"
    18→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
    19→
    20→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/graph/generated"
    21→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/graph/resolver"
    22→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/auth"
    23→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/config"
    24→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/feedback"
    25→	kapowhandler "github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/handler"
    26→	kapowmcp "github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/mcp"
    27→	kapowmiddleware "github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/middleware"
    28→	kapowotel "github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/otel"
    29→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/preference"
    30→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/savedsearch"
    31→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/search"
    32→	"github.com/ketang/kapow/api/internal/user"
    33→)
    34→
    35→// Deps holds the dependencies needed to construct the router.
    36→type Deps struct {
    37→	Config            *config.Config
    38→	DB                *pgxpool.Pool
    39→	Validator         auth.Validator
    40→	Search            *search.Registry
    41→	UserService       *user.Service
    42→	PreferenceService *preference.Service
    43→
    44→	// HTTPDetailConfig holds the hot-reloadable HTTP debug logging config.
    45→	// A future admin endpoint can call .Store() to change settings at runtime.
    46→	// If nil, New() initialises it from Config.
    47→	HTTPDetailConfig *atomic.Pointer[kapowmiddleware.HTTPDetailConfig]
    48→
    49→	// PrivateCIDRs restricts /private/* routes to these IP ranges.
    50→	PrivateCIDRs []*net.IPNet
    51→
    52→	// UI holds the embedded SPA filesystem. When non-nil, unmatched routes
    53→	// serve the SPA (static files + index.html fallback).
    54→	UI fs.FS
    55→}
    56→
    57→// New constructs the chi router with all middleware, routes, and handlers.
    58→func New(deps Deps) http.Handler {
    59→	r := chi.NewRouter()
    60→
    61→	// Initialise hot-reloadable HTTP detail config if not provided.
    62→	if deps.HTTPDetailConfig == nil {
    63→		deps.HTTPDetailConfig = &atomic.Pointer[kapowmiddleware.HTTPDetailConfig]{}
    64→		deps.HTTPDetailConfig.Store(kapowmiddleware.NewHTTPDetailConfig(deps.Config))
    65→	}
    66→
    67→	// Global middleware (applied to every request)
    68→	if deps.Config.OTelEnabled {
    69→		r.Use(kapowotel.Middleware("kapow-api"))
    70→	}
    71→	r.Use(kapowmiddleware.RequestID)
    72→	r.Use(kapowmiddleware.Logging)
    73→	r.Use(kapowmiddleware.Recovery)
    74→	r.Use(kapowmiddleware.HTTPDetail(deps.HTTPDetailConfig))
    75→	r.Use(chimiddleware.RealIP)
    76→	r.Use(chimiddleware.StripSlashes)
    77→
    78→	// Build gqlgen server
    79→	feedbackService := feedback.NewService(deps.DB)
    80→	savedSearchSvc := savedsearch.NewService(deps.DB)
    81→	gqlSrv := handler.New(generated.NewExecutableSchema(generated.Config{
    82→		Resolvers: &resolver.Resolver{
    83→			DB:          deps.DB,
    84→			Search:      deps.Search,
    85→			Preference:  deps.PreferenceService,
    86→			Feedback:    feedbackService,
    87→			SavedSearch: savedSearchSvc,
    88→			Config:      deps.Config,
    89→		},
    90→	}))
    91→	gqlSrv.AddTransport(transport.POST{})
    92→	gqlSrv.AddTransport(transport.GET{})
    93→	if deps.Config.GraphQLIntrospection {
    94→		gqlSrv.Use(extension.Introspection{})
    95→	}
    96→
    97→	// GraphQL endpoint — optional auth (anonymous allowed, user provisioned if token present)
    98→	r.Route("/graphql", func(r chi.Router) {
    99→		r.Use(kapowmiddleware.OptionalAuth(deps.Validator))
   100→		r.Use(kapowmiddleware.EnsureUser(deps.UserService))
   101→		if deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled {
   102→			r.Use(authRateLimitOverride(deps.Config.RateLimitGraphQLAuth))
   103→			r.Use(httprate.Limit(
   104→				deps.Config.RateLimitGraphQL,
   105→				time.Minute,
   106→				httprate.WithKeyFuncs(authOrIPKeyFunc),
   107→			))
   108→		}
   109→		r.Post("/", gqlSrv.ServeHTTP)
   110→		r.Get("/", gqlSrv.ServeHTTP)
   111→	})
   112→
   113→	// Dev-only mock auth endpoint — issues JWTs without Supabase
   114→	if deps.Config.Env == "development" {
   115→		r.Post("/dev/auth/login", kapowhandler.DevLogin(deps.Config.JWTSecret))
   116→		slog.Info("router: dev auth endpoint enabled at /dev/auth/login")
   117→	}
   118→
   119→	// GraphQL Playground (dev only)
   120→	if deps.Config.GraphQLPlayground {
   121→		r.Get("/playground", playground.Handler("Kapow API", "/graphql"))
   122→		slog.Info("router: GraphQL Playground enabled at /playground")
   123→	}
   124→
   125→	// CSV export endpoint — optional auth + rate limited
   126→	r.Route("/api/export", func(r chi.Router) {
   127→		r.Use(kapowmiddleware.OptionalAuth(deps.Validator))
   128→		r.Use(kapowmiddleware.EnsureUser(deps.UserService))
   129→		if deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled {
   130→			r.Use(httprate.Limit(
   131→				deps.Config.RateLimitExport,
   132→				time.Minute,
   133→				httprate.WithKeyFuncs(authOrIPKeyFunc),
   134→			))
   135→		}
   136→		r.Get("/csv", kapowhandler.ExportCSV(deps.DB, deps.Search, deps.Config.MaxExportRows))
   137→	})
   138→
   139→	// Private (internal) routes — IP allowlisted
   140→	r.Route("/private", func(r chi.Router) {
   141→		if len(deps.PrivateCIDRs) > 0 {
   142→			r.Use(kapowmiddleware.IPAllowlist(deps.PrivateCIDRs))
   143→		}
   144→		r.Get("/healthcheck", kapowhandler.Health(deps.DB))
   145→		r.Get("/log-config", kapowhandler.LogConfig(deps.Config))
   146→		r.Put("/log-config", kapowhandler.LogConfig(deps.Config))
   147→	})
   148→
   149→	// MCP (Model Context Protocol) endpoint — AI client integration
   150→	// Protected with mandatory Auth middleware; unauthenticated requests
   151→	// receive 401 with WWW-Authenticate header per MCP OAuth 2.1 spec.
   152→	if deps.Config.MCPEnabled {
   153→		r.Route("/mcp", func(r chi.Router) {
   154→			r.Use(kapowmiddleware.Auth(deps.Validator))
   155→			if deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled {
   156→				r.Use(httprate.Limit(
   157→					deps.Config.RateLimitMCP,
   158→					time.Minute,
   159→					httprate.WithKeyFuncs(authOrIPKeyFunc),
   160→				))
   161→			}
   162→			r.Handle("/*", kapowmcp.NewHandler(deps.DB, deps.Search))
   163→		})
   164→		slog.Info("router: MCP endpoint enabled at /mcp")
   165→	}
   166→
   167→	// OAuth 2.1 Protected Resource Metadata (RFC 9728)
   168→	r.Get("/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource", kapowhandler.ProtectedResourceMetadata(deps.Config))
   169→
   170→	// Embedded SPA — serve static files and fall back to index.html
   171→	if deps.UI != nil {
   172→		r.NotFound(kapowhandler.SPAHandler(deps.UI).ServeHTTP)
   173→		slog.Info("router: embedded SPA enabled")
   174→	}
   175→
   176→	slog.Info("router: initialized",
   177→		"graphql_introspection", deps.Config.GraphQLIntrospection,
   178→		"graphql_playground", deps.Config.GraphQLPlayground,
   179→		"mcp_enabled", deps.Config.MCPEnabled,
   180→		"rate_limit_enabled", deps.Config.RateLimitEnabled,
   181→		"embedded_ui", deps.UI != nil,
   182→	)
   183→
   184→	return r
   185→}
   186→
   187→// authOrIPKeyFunc keys by user subject if authenticated, otherwise by client IP.
   188→func authOrIPKeyFunc(r *http.Request) (string, error) {
   189→	if claims := auth.GetClaims(r.Context()); claims != nil {
   190→		return "user:" + claims.Subject, nil
   191→	}
   192→	return "ip:" + r.RemoteAddr, nil
   193→}
   194→
   195→// authRateLimitOverride returns middleware that raises the httprate request limit
   196→// for authenticated users by setting WithRequestLimit in the request context.
   197→func authRateLimitOverride(authLimit int) func(http.Handler) http.Handler {
   198→	return func(next http.Handler) http.Handler {
   199→		return http.HandlerFunc(func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
   200→			if auth.GetClaims(r.Context()) != nil {
   201→				r = r.WithContext(httprate.WithRequestLimit(r.Context(), authLimit))
   202→			}
   203→			next.ServeHTTP(w, r)
   204→		})
   205→	}
   206→}
   207→

# College Bookmarks MVP (kapow-u9s)

## Context

The homepage promises save/compare behavior but no bookmark UX or API exists. The `ugc.saved_institution` table already exists with a unique constraint on `(unit_id, team_id)`, so no migration is needed. This plan adds full-stack bookmark CRUD following the saved search MVP pattern exactly.

## Implementation

### 1. Backend Service — `api/internal/bookmark/service.go`

New package following `savedsearch` pattern. Struct:

```go
type SavedInstitution struct {
    ID, UnitID, Name, City, State string
    Created, Updated              time.Time
}
type Service struct { pool *pgxpool.Pool }
```

Methods:
- `NewService(pool)` — constructor
- `TeamIDForUser(ctx, userID) (string, error)` — same query as savedsearch (`subscription.team_member`)
- `List(ctx, teamID) ([]SavedInstitution, error)` — JOIN with `search_base.institution` for name/city/state, ORDER BY created DESC
- `Add(ctx, teamID, unitID) (*SavedInstitution, error)` — INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET updated=now(), RETURNING with JOIN
- `Remove(ctx, teamID, unitID) error` — DELETE WHERE team_id=$1 AND unit_id=$2
- `IsBookmarkedBatch(ctx, teamID, unitIDs) (map[string]bool, error)` — SELECT unit_id WHERE unit_id = ANY($2)

**File: `api/internal/bookmark/service_test.go`** — integration tests (skip on `-short`/no DB): Add, Remove, List, idempotent Add, team isolation, batch check.

### 2. GraphQL Schema — `api/graph/schema/bookmark.graphql`

```graphql
type BookmarkedInstitution {
  id: String!
  unitID: String!
  name: String!
  city: String!
  state: String!
  createdAt: String!
}

extend type Query {
  bookmarkedInstitutions: [BookmarkedInstitution!]!
  bookmarkedUnitIDs(unitIDs: [String!]!): [String!]!
}

extend type Mutation {
  addBookmark(unitID: String!): BookmarkedInstitution!
  removeBookmark(unitID: String!): Boolean!
}
```

Then `make api-generate`.

### 3. Resolvers — `api/graph/resolver/bookmark.resolvers.go`

- Queries: optional auth (return empty list/slice if anonymous)
- Mutations: required auth (return error if no claims)
- Pattern: `GetClaims(ctx)` → `TeamIDForUser` → service call → map to model

### 4. Wiring

- `api/graph/resolver/resolver.go`: Add `Bookmark *bookmark.Service` to Resolver struct
- `api/internal/router/router.go`: Create `bookmark.NewService(deps.DB)`, wire into resolver

### 5. Schema Sync

`make web-schema-sync` to regenerate `web/schema.graphql` + `web/src/graphql-env.d.ts`.

### 6. Frontend Store — `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.ts`

```ts
interface BookmarkState {
  bookmarkedIDs: Set<string>
  loaded: boolean
  loading: boolean
  loadAll: () => Promise<void>         // full list for drawer
  checkBatch: (unitIDs: string[]) => Promise<void>  // after search results
  add: (unitID: string) => Promise<boolean>
  remove: (unitID: string) => Promise<boolean>
  isBookmarked: (unitID: string) => boolean
  clear: () => void
}
```

All GraphQL ops via `graphql()` from `gql.tada`. Uses `urqlClient` directly (same as savedSearchStore).

**File: `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.test.ts`** — unit tests with mocked urqlClient.

### 7. BookmarkButton — `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.tsx`

- `ActionIcon` with `Heart` from lucide-react (filled when bookmarked, outline when not)
- Reads from `useBookmarkStore` and `useAuthStore`
- Anonymous: disabled with `Tooltip` "Sign in to bookmark"
- `e.stopPropagation()` on click (cards are clickable)
- Props: `{ unitID: string; size?: 'sm' | 'md' }`

**File: `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.test.tsx`**

### 8. BookmarksDrawer — `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.tsx`

Mantine `Drawer` (right side) following `SavedSearchesDrawer` pattern:
- On open → `loadAll()` which returns full `SavedInstitution` objects (name/city/state)
- Each item: name, city/state, remove button
- Click item navigates to search with detail open
- Empty state message

**File: `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.test.tsx`**

### 9. Integration into Existing Components

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `web/src/components/search/InstitutionCard.tsx` | Add `BookmarkButton` top-right corner (absolute positioned) |
| `web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx` | Add `BookmarkButton` next to title in modal header |
| `web/src/components/auth/UserMenu.tsx` | Add "Bookmarks" menu item with `Heart` icon |
| `web/src/pages/Search.tsx` | Render `BookmarksDrawer`; call `checkBatch` after results load; handle `?showBookmarks=1` URL param |
| `web/src/components/search/index.ts` | Export new components |

### 10. Key Files to Modify/Create

**Create:**
- `api/internal/bookmark/service.go`
- `api/internal/bookmark/service_test.go`
- `api/graph/schema/bookmark.graphql`
- `api/graph/resolver/bookmark.resolvers.go`
- `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.ts`
- `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.test.ts`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.test.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.test.tsx`

**Modify:**
- `api/graph/resolver/resolver.go` — add Bookmark field
- `api/internal/router/router.go` — wire bookmark service
- `web/src/components/search/InstitutionCard.tsx` — add bookmark button
- `web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx` — add bookmark button
- `web/src/components/auth/UserMenu.tsx` — add Bookmarks menu item
- `web/src/pages/Search.tsx` — drawer + batch check
- `web/src/components/search/index.ts` — exports

**Auto-generated (do not edit manually):**
- `api/graph/generated/generated.go`
- `api/graph/model/models_gen.go`
- `web/schema.graphql`
- `web/src/graphql-env.d.ts`

## Verification

1. `make api-generate` — must succeed
2. `make web-schema-sync` — must succeed
3. `make test-standard` — Go unit tests + TS build + ESLint + web unit tests (quality gate)
4. Manual: `make dev` → sign in → bookmark from card → reload → bookmark persists → open drawer → see list → unbookmark

# College Bookmarks MVP (kapow-u9s)

## Context

The homepage promises save/compare behavior but no bookmark UX or API exists. The `ugc.saved_institution` table already exists with a unique constraint on `(unit_id, team_id)`, so no migration is needed. This plan adds full-stack bookmark CRUD following the saved search MVP pattern exactly.

## Implementation

### 1. Backend Service — `api/internal/bookmark/service.go`

New package following `savedsearch` pattern. Struct:

```go
type SavedInstitution struct {
    ID, UnitID, Name, City, State string
    Created, Updated              time.Time
}
type Service struct { pool *pgxpool.Pool }
```

Methods:
- `NewService(pool)` — constructor
- `TeamIDForUser(ctx, userID) (string, error)` — same query as savedsearch (`subscription.team_member`)
- `List(ctx, teamID) ([]SavedInstitution, error)` — JOIN with `search_base.institution` for name/city/state, ORDER BY created DESC
- `Add(ctx, teamID, unitID) (*SavedInstitution, error)` — INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET updated=now(), RETURNING with JOIN
- `Remove(ctx, teamID, unitID) error` — DELETE WHERE team_id=$1 AND unit_id=$2
- `IsBookmarkedBatch(ctx, teamID, unitIDs) (map[string]bool, error)` — SELECT unit_id WHERE unit_id = ANY($2)

**File: `api/internal/bookmark/service_test.go`** — integration tests (skip on `-short`/no DB): Add, Remove, List, idempotent Add, team isolation, batch check.

### 2. GraphQL Schema — `api/graph/schema/bookmark.graphql`

```graphql
type BookmarkedInstitution {
  id: String!
  unitID: String!
  name: String!
  city: String!
  state: String!
  createdAt: String!
}

extend type Query {
  bookmarkedInstitutions: [BookmarkedInstitution!]!
  bookmarkedUnitIDs(unitIDs: [String!]!): [String!]!
}

extend type Mutation {
  addBookmark(unitID: String!): BookmarkedInstitution!
  removeBookmark(unitID: String!): Boolean!
}
```

Then `make api-generate`.

### 3. Resolvers — `api/graph/resolver/bookmark.resolvers.go`

- Queries: optional auth (return empty list/slice if anonymous)
- Mutations: required auth (return error if no claims)
- Pattern: `GetClaims(ctx)` → `TeamIDForUser` → service call → map to model

### 4. Wiring

- `api/graph/resolver/resolver.go`: Add `Bookmark *bookmark.Service` to Resolver struct
- `api/internal/router/router.go`: Create `bookmark.NewService(deps.DB)`, wire into resolver

### 5. Schema Sync

`make web-schema-sync` to regenerate `web/schema.graphql` + `web/src/graphql-env.d.ts`.

### 6. Frontend Store — `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.ts`

```ts
interface BookmarkState {
  bookmarkedIDs: Set<string>
  loaded: boolean
  loading: boolean
  loadAll: () => Promise<void>         // full list for drawer
  checkBatch: (unitIDs: string[]) => Promise<void>  // after search results
  add: (unitID: string) => Promise<boolean>
  remove: (unitID: string) => Promise<boolean>
  isBookmarked: (unitID: string) => boolean
  clear: () => void
}
```

All GraphQL ops via `graphql()` from `gql.tada`. Uses `urqlClient` directly (same as savedSearchStore).

**File: `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.test.ts`** — unit tests with mocked urqlClient.

### 7. BookmarkButton — `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.tsx`

- `ActionIcon` with `Heart` from lucide-react (filled when bookmarked, outline when not)
- Reads from `useBookmarkStore` and `useAuthStore`
- Anonymous: disabled with `Tooltip` "Sign in to bookmark"
- `e.stopPropagation()` on click (cards are clickable)
- Props: `{ unitID: string; size?: 'sm' | 'md' }`

**File: `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.test.tsx`**

### 8. BookmarksDrawer — `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.tsx`

Mantine `Drawer` (right side) following `SavedSearchesDrawer` pattern:
- On open → `loadAll()` which returns full `SavedInstitution` objects (name/city/state)
- Each item: name, city/state, remove button
- Click item navigates to search with detail open
- Empty state message

**File: `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.test.tsx`**

### 9. Integration into Existing Components

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `web/src/components/search/InstitutionCard.tsx` | Add `BookmarkButton` top-right corner (absolute positioned) |
| `web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx` | Add `BookmarkButton` next to title in modal header |
| `web/src/components/auth/UserMenu.tsx` | Add "Bookmarks" menu item with `Heart` icon |
| `web/src/pages/Search.tsx` | Render `BookmarksDrawer`; call `checkBatch` after results load; handle `?showBookmarks=1` URL param |
| `web/src/components/search/index.ts` | Export new components |

### 10. Key Files to Modify/Create

**Create:**
- `api/internal/bookmark/service.go`
- `api/internal/bookmark/service_test.go`
- `api/graph/schema/bookmark.graphql`
- `api/graph/resolver/bookmark.resolvers.go`
- `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.ts`
- `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.test.ts`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.test.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.test.tsx`

**Modify:**
- `api/graph/resolver/resolver.go` — add Bookmark field
- `api/internal/router/router.go` — wire bookmark service
- `web/src/components/search/InstitutionCard.tsx` — add bookmark button
- `web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx` — add bookmark button
- `web/src/components/auth/UserMenu.tsx` — add Bookmarks menu item
- `web/src/pages/Search.tsx` — drawer + batch check
- `web/src/components/search/index.ts` — exports

**Auto-generated (do not edit manually):**
- `api/graph/generated/generated.go`
- `api/graph/model/models_gen.go`
- `web/schema.graphql`
- `web/src/graphql-env.d.ts`

## Verification

1. `make api-generate` — must succeed
2. `make web-schema-sync` — must succeed
3. `make test-standard` — Go unit tests + TS build + ESLint + web unit tests (quality gate)
4. Manual: `make dev` → sign in → bookmark from card → reload → bookmark persists → open drawer → see list → unbookmark

file.content:
# College Bookmarks MVP (kapow-u9s)

## Context

The homepage promises save/compare behavior but no bookmark UX or API exists. The `ugc.saved_institution` table already exists with a unique constraint on `(unit_id, team_id)`, so no migration is needed. This plan adds full-stack bookmark CRUD following the saved search MVP pattern exactly.

## Implementation

### 1. Backend Service — `api/internal/bookmark/service.go`

New package following `savedsearch` pattern. Struct:

```go
type SavedInstitution struct {
    ID, UnitID, Name, City, State string
    Created, Updated              time.Time
}
type Service struct { pool *pgxpool.Pool }
```

Methods:
- `NewService(pool)` — constructor
- `TeamIDForUser(ctx, userID) (string, error)` — same query as savedsearch (`subscription.team_member`)
- `List(ctx, teamID) ([]SavedInstitution, error)` — JOIN with `search_base.institution` for name/city/state, ORDER BY created DESC
- `Add(ctx, teamID, unitID) (*SavedInstitution, error)` — INSERT ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET updated=now(), RETURNING with JOIN
- `Remove(ctx, teamID, unitID) error` — DELETE WHERE team_id=$1 AND unit_id=$2
- `IsBookmarkedBatch(ctx, teamID, unitIDs) (map[string]bool, error)` — SELECT unit_id WHERE unit_id = ANY($2)

**File: `api/internal/bookmark/service_test.go`** — integration tests (skip on `-short`/no DB): Add, Remove, List, idempotent Add, team isolation, batch check.

### 2. GraphQL Schema — `api/graph/schema/bookmark.graphql`

```graphql
type BookmarkedInstitution {
  id: String!
  unitID: String!
  name: String!
  city: String!
  state: String!
  createdAt: String!
}

extend type Query {
  bookmarkedInstitutions: [BookmarkedInstitution!]!
  bookmarkedUnitIDs(unitIDs: [String!]!): [String!]!
}

extend type Mutation {
  addBookmark(unitID: String!): BookmarkedInstitution!
  removeBookmark(unitID: String!): Boolean!
}
```

Then `make api-generate`.

### 3. Resolvers — `api/graph/resolver/bookmark.resolvers.go`

- Queries: optional auth (return empty list/slice if anonymous)
- Mutations: required auth (return error if no claims)
- Pattern: `GetClaims(ctx)` → `TeamIDForUser` → service call → map to model

### 4. Wiring

- `api/graph/resolver/resolver.go`: Add `Bookmark *bookmark.Service` to Resolver struct
- `api/internal/router/router.go`: Create `bookmark.NewService(deps.DB)`, wire into resolver

### 5. Schema Sync

`make web-schema-sync` to regenerate `web/schema.graphql` + `web/src/graphql-env.d.ts`.

### 6. Frontend Store — `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.ts`

```ts
interface BookmarkState {
  bookmarkedIDs: Set<string>
  loaded: boolean
  loading: boolean
  loadAll: () => Promise<void>         // full list for drawer
  checkBatch: (unitIDs: string[]) => Promise<void>  // after search results
  add: (unitID: string) => Promise<boolean>
  remove: (unitID: string) => Promise<boolean>
  isBookmarked: (unitID: string) => boolean
  clear: () => void
}
```

All GraphQL ops via `graphql()` from `gql.tada`. Uses `urqlClient` directly (same as savedSearchStore).

**File: `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.test.ts`** — unit tests with mocked urqlClient.

### 7. BookmarkButton — `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.tsx`

- `ActionIcon` with `Heart` from lucide-react (filled when bookmarked, outline when not)
- Reads from `useBookmarkStore` and `useAuthStore`
- Anonymous: disabled with `Tooltip` "Sign in to bookmark"
- `e.stopPropagation()` on click (cards are clickable)
- Props: `{ unitID: string; size?: 'sm' | 'md' }`

**File: `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.test.tsx`**

### 8. BookmarksDrawer — `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.tsx`

Mantine `Drawer` (right side) following `SavedSearchesDrawer` pattern:
- On open → `loadAll()` which returns full `SavedInstitution` objects (name/city/state)
- Each item: name, city/state, remove button
- Click item navigates to search with detail open
- Empty state message

**File: `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.test.tsx`**

### 9. Integration into Existing Components

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `web/src/components/search/InstitutionCard.tsx` | Add `BookmarkButton` top-right corner (absolute positioned) |
| `web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx` | Add `BookmarkButton` next to title in modal header |
| `web/src/components/auth/UserMenu.tsx` | Add "Bookmarks" menu item with `Heart` icon |
| `web/src/pages/Search.tsx` | Render `BookmarksDrawer`; call `checkBatch` after results load; handle `?showBookmarks=1` URL param |
| `web/src/components/search/index.ts` | Export new components |

### 10. Key Files to Modify/Create

**Create:**
- `api/internal/bookmark/service.go`
- `api/internal/bookmark/service_test.go`
- `api/graph/schema/bookmark.graphql`
- `api/graph/resolver/bookmark.resolvers.go`
- `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.ts`
- `web/src/stores/bookmarkStore.test.ts`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarkButton.test.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.tsx`
- `web/src/components/search/BookmarksDrawer.test.tsx`

**Modify:**
- `api/graph/resolver/resolver.go` — add Bookmark field
- `api/internal/router/router.go` — wire bookmark service
- `web/src/components/search/InstitutionCard.tsx` — add bookmark button
- `web/src/components/search/InstitutionDetail.tsx` — add bookmark button
- `web/src/components/auth/UserMenu.tsx` — add Bookmarks menu item
- `web/src/pages/Search.tsx` — drawer + batch check
- `web/src/components/search/index.ts` — exports

**Auto-generated (do not edit manually):**
- `api/graph/generated/generated.go`
- `api/graph/model/models_gen.go`
- `web/schema.graphql`
- `web/src/graphql-env.d.ts`

## Verification

1. `make api-generate` — must succeed
2. `make web-schema-sync` — must succeed
3. `make test-standard` — Go unit tests + TS build + ESLint + web unit tests (quality gate)
4. Manual: `make dev` → sign in → bookmark from card → reload → bookmark persists → open drawer → see list → unbookmark

input.content:
type BookmarkedInstitution {
  id: String!
  unitID: String!
  name: String!
  city: String!
  state: String!
  createdAt: String!
}

extend type Query {
  """
  Returns the current user's bookmarked institutions.
  Returns an empty list if not authenticated.
  """
  bookmarkedInstitutions: [BookmarkedInstitution!]!

  """
  Checks which of the given unit IDs are bookmarked by the current user.
  Returns the subset of input IDs that are bookmarked.
  Returns an empty list if not authenticated.
  """
  bookmarkedUnitIDs(unitIDs: [String!]!): [String!]!
}

extend type Mutation {
  """
  Bookmark an institution. Requires authentication. Idempotent.
  """
  addBookmark(unitID: String!): BookmarkedInstitution!

  """
  Remove a bookmark. Requires authentication.
  Returns true if removed, false if not found.
  """
  removeBookmark(unitID: String!): Boolean!
}

toolUseResult.originalFile:
## Kapow Monorepo Makefile — delegates to component Makefiles
## Usage: make <target>

# Load .env if present — makes vars available to shell commands in recipes
-include .env
export VITE_SUPABASE_URL VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY

.PHONY: api-build api-run api-generate api-test api-test-unit \
        api-lint api-migrate-up api-migrate-down api-clean schema-gen \
        web-install web-dev web-build web-lint web-clean web-test web-test-coverage web-e2e web-test-e2e web-test-e2e-critical web-test-e2e-acceptance web-test-e2e-contained web-test-e2e-contained-critical web-screenshots web-storybook \
        web-schema-sync \
        lint audit hadolint semgrep ast-grep-check ast-grep-test \
        smoke-test smoke-test-with-server \
        api-image-build web-image-build test-image-build test-image-run \
        tools-build tools-test kapow-build kapow-test kapow-test-unit feedbacksync-build feedbacksync-test \
        dev dev-clean dev-prune dev-db-up dev-db-down \
        compose-up compose-down compose-logs \
        test-quick test-standard test-full test-fixture verify-agent verify-ci \
        fixture-sql fixture-json \
        build-full \
        spec-gen \
        demo \
        help

## api-build: Build the API server binary
api-build:
	$(MAKE) -C api build

## build-full: Build single binary with embedded web frontend (API + SPA)
build-full: web-build
	$(MAKE) -C api build-full

## api-run: Run the API server
api-run:
	$(MAKE) -C api run

## api-generate: Run GraphQL code generation
api-generate:
	$(MAKE) -C api generate

## api-test: Run all API tests
api-test:
	$(MAKE) -C api test

## api-test-unit: Run API unit tests
api-test-unit:
	$(MAKE) -C api test-unit

## api-lint: Run linter on the API
api-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C api lint

## api-migrate-up: Apply database migrations
api-migrate-up:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-up

## api-migrate-down: Roll back last database migration
api-migrate-down:
	$(MAKE) -C api migrate-down

## api-clean: Remove API build artifacts
api-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C api clean

## schema-gen: Generate common/schema/schema.sql from migration Up blocks
schema-gen:
	bash scripts/gen-schema.sh

## web-install: Install web frontend dependencies
web-install:
	$(MAKE) -C web install

## web-dev: Start Vite dev server (port 8080, proxies /graphql → :8081)
web-dev:
	$(MAKE) -C web dev

## web-build: Type-check and build web frontend for production
web-build:
	$(MAKE) -C web build

## web-lint: Run ESLint on web frontend
web-lint:
	$(MAKE) -C web lint

## web-clean: Remove web build artifacts and node_modules
web-clean:
	$(MAKE) -C web clean

## web-test: Run web unit tests
web-test:
	$(MAKE) -C web test

## web-test-coverage: Run web unit tests with coverage report
web-test-coverage:
	$(MAKE) -C web test-coverage

## web-e2e: Run Playwright E2E tests for web frontend (starts Vite dev server automatically)
web-e2e:
	$(MAKE) -C web e2e-test

## web-test-e2e: Run all Playwright E2E tests (alias with webServer auto-start)
web-test-e2e:
	$(MAKE) -C web e2e-test

## web-test-e2e-critical: Run only @critical tier E2E tests
web-test-e2e-critical:
	$(MAKE) -C web e2e-test-critical

## web-test-e2e-acceptance: Run product contract acceptance tests
web-test-e2e-acceptance:
	cd web && pnpm exec playwright test --grep @acceptance

## web-test-e2e-contained: Run all E2E tests against self-contained Docker stack (no external deps)
web-test-e2e-contained:
	bash scripts/e2e-self-contained.sh

## web-test-e2e-contained-critical: Run @critical E2E tests against self-contained Docker stack
web-test-e2e-contained-critical:
	bash scripts/e2e-self-contained.sh --grep @critical

## web-screenshots: Capture visual baseline screenshots across viewports
web-screenshots:
	$(MAKE) -C web screenshots

## web-storybook: Start Storybook dev server for UI components (port 6006)
web-storybook:
	$(MAKE) -C web storybook

## web-schema-sync: Regenerate web/schema.graphql and graphql-env.d.ts from API SDL files
web-schema-sync:
	cat api/graph/schema/schema.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/auth.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/data_sources.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/echo.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/feedback.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/field_names_gen.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/institution.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/preferences.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/saved_search.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/search.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/search_fields.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/similarity.graphql \
	    api/graph/schema/zip.graphql \
	    > web/schema.graphql
	cd web && pnpm exec gql-tada generate-output --tsconfig tsconfig.app.json

## lint: Run all linters (Go + web)
lint: api-lint web-lint ast-grep-check

## ast-grep-check: Run ast-grep structural rules
ast-grep-check:
	@command -v ast-grep >/dev/null 2>&1 && ast-grep scan || npx --yes @ast-grep/cli scan

## ast-grep-test: Run ast-grep rule tests
ast-grep-test:
	@command -v ast-grep >/dev/null 2>&1 && ast-grep test --skip-snapshot-tests || npx --yes @ast-grep/cli test --skip-snapshot-tests

## audit: Run security audit on web dependencies (non-zero exit on high+ severity)
audit:
	cd web && pnpm audit --audit-level=high

## hadolint: Lint all Dockerfiles with hadolint (runs via Docker)
hadolint:
	@find . -name 'Dockerfile*' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -not -path '*/dist/*' | sort | \
		while read -r f; do \
			echo "Linting $$f"; \
			docker run --rm -i hadolint/hadolint < "$$f" || exit 1; \
		done

## semgrep: Run Semgrep static analysis (requires: pip install semgrep)
semgrep:
	semgrep scan \
		--config p/golang \
		--config p/typescript \
		--config p/owasp-top-ten \
		--config p/secrets \
		--config .semgrep/semgrep.yml \
		--exclude 'node_modules' \
		--exclude 'dist' \
		--exclude 'vendor' \
		--exclude 'api/graph/generated' \
		--exclude 'api/graph/model/models_gen.go' \
		--exclude 'api/migrations' \
		--exclude 'common/src/main/resources/data' \
		--exclude '.semgrep' \
		.

## smoke-test: Run search smoke test against localhost:8081 (requires running API)
smoke-test:
	bash scripts/smoke-test.sh

## smoke-test-with-server: Build API, start it, run smoke test, tear down (requires DATABASE_URL)
smoke-test-with-server:
	bash scripts/smoke-test-with-server.sh

## api-image-build: Build the standalone API production Docker image
api-image-build:
	docker build -f api/Dockerfile \
		--build-arg VERSION=$$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo dev) \
		--build-arg BUILD_TIME=$$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ) \
		-t kapow-api \
		api/

## web-image-build: Build the standalone web frontend Docker image (nginx + Vite build)
web-image-build:
	docker build \
		$$([ -n "$$VITE_SUPABASE_URL" ] && echo "--build-arg VITE_SUPABASE_URL=$$VITE_SUPABASE_URL") \
		$$([ -n "$$VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" ] && echo "--build-arg VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$$VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY") \
		-t kapow-web web/

## test-image-build: Build the all-in-one test Docker image (postgres+API+nginx)
test-image-build: hadolint
	docker build \
		$$([ -n "$$VITE_SUPABASE_URL" ] && echo "--build-arg VITE_SUPABASE_URL=$$VITE_SUPABASE_URL") \
		$$([ -n "$$VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY" ] && echo "--build-arg VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$$VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY") \
		-t kapow-test .

## test-image-run: Run the test image, exposing the web UI on http://localhost:8080
test-image-run: test-image-build
	docker run --rm -p 8080:80 kapow-test

## demo: Build test image, run it, and launch the interactive Playwright demo
demo:
	bash scripts/demo.sh $(DEMO_ARGS)

## dev: Start full-stack dev environment (PostgreSQL + API + web) with hot reload
dev:
	bash scripts/dev.sh

## dev-clean: Remove this checkout's dev database volume (forces fresh fixture load on next `make dev`)
dev-clean:
	@HASH=$$(echo "$$PWD" | md5sum | cut -c1-8); \
	VOL="kapow-dev-pgdata-$$HASH"; \
	CONT="kapow-dev-$$HASH"; \
	docker rm -f "$$CONT" 2>/dev/null || true; \
	if docker volume inspect "$$VOL" >/dev/null 2>&1; then \
		docker volume rm "$$VOL"; \
		echo "Removed volume $$VOL"; \
	else \
		echo "Volume $$VOL does not exist"; \
	fi

## dev-db-up: Start standalone dev database (PostgreSQL+PostGIS on port 5433, full dataset)
dev-db-up:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml up -d --wait
	@echo ""
	@echo "Dev database starting on port 5433. Use:"
	@echo "  DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5433/kapow?sslmode=disable"

## dev-db-down: Stop and remove the standalone dev database container
dev-db-down:
	docker compose -f compose/db.yml down

## compose-up: Start 3-service production topology (db + api + web) on http://localhost:8080
compose-up:
	docker compose -f compose/compose.yml up -d --build --wait

## compose-down: Stop and remove compose services and volumes
compose-down:
	docker compose -f compose/compose.yml down -v

## compose-logs: Tail logs from all compose services
compose-logs:
	docker compose -f compose/compose.yml logs -f

## dev-prune: Remove kapow-dev volumes older than 30 days
dev-prune:
	@CUTOFF=$$(date -d '30 days ago' +%s 2>/dev/null || date -v-30d +%s); \
	for vol in $$(docker volume ls --filter label=kapow-dev=true -q 2>/dev/null); do \
		CREATED=$$(docker volume inspect "$$vol" --format '{{.CreatedAt}}' 2>/dev/null); \
		VOL_TS=$$(date -d "$$CREATED" +%s 2>/dev/null || date -j -f "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S" "$$CREATED" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0); \
		if [ "$$VOL_TS" -lt "$$CUTOFF" ]; then \
			echo "Removing old volume: $$vol (created $$CREATED)"; \
			docker volume rm "$$vol" 2>/dev/null || true; \
		fi; \
	done; \
	echo "Prune complete."

## kapow-build: Build the kapow data pipeline binary
kapow-build:
	cd tools/kapow && go build -o ../../bin/kapow .

## kapow-test: Run all kapow tool tests
kapow-test:
	cd tools/kapow && go test ./...

## kapow-test-unit: Run kapow unit tests only (no DB)
kapow-test-unit:
	cd tools/kapow && go test -short ./...

## feedbacksync-build: Build the feedbacksync binary
feedbacksync-build:
	cd tools/feedbacksync && go build -o ../../bin/feedbacksync .

## feedbacksync-test: Run feedbacksync tests
feedbacksync-test:
	cd tools/feedbacksync && go test ./...

## tools-build: Build all tools (samplesql, kapow, feedbacksync)
tools-build: kapow-build feedbacksync-build
	cd tools/samplesql && go build -o ../../bin/samplesql .

## tools-test: Run tests for all tools
tools-test: kapow-test feedbacksync-test
	cd tools/samplesql && go test ./...

## test-quick: Fast checks — Go unit tests, TS type-check + build, ESLint (~10-20s, no DB)
test-quick:
	MAKE=$(MAKE) bash scripts/parallel-run.sh api-test-unit web-build web-lint

## test-standard: Full local validation — quick + web unit tests + Go lint (~30-60s, no DB)
test-standard:
	$(MAKE) test-quick && MAKE=$(MAKE) bash scripts/parallel-run.sh web-test api-lint

## test-fixture: Validate fixture data loads cleanly against current schema (spins up temp Docker PG)
test-fixture:
	bash scripts/test-fixture.sh

## test-full: Complete validation — standard + integration, e2e, smoke, fixture (requires Docker)
test-full:
	$(MAKE) test-standard && MAKE=$(MAKE) bash scripts/parallel-run.sh api-test test-fixture tools-test && $(MAKE) web-test-e2e-contained && $(MAKE) smoke-test

## verify-agent: Diff-aware verification — classifies changes and runs only the required checks
verify-agent:
	bash scripts/verify-agent.sh

## verify-ci: CI-friendly verification — supports merge and release scopes
verify-ci:
	bash scripts/verify-ci.sh

## fixture-sql: Generate complete.sql.xz from JSON fixture data (requires Docker)
fixture-sql:
	bash scripts/gen-fixture-sql.sh

## fixture-json: Re-extract JSON fixture data from a live database (requires DATABASE_URL)
fixture-json:
	cd tools/samplesql && go run . --format json --output-dir ../../common/src/main/resources/data/tables

## validate-contracts: Validate contract registry files against JSON Schema
validate-contracts:
	bash scripts/validate-contracts.sh

## scan-visible-claims: Check visible capability claims against contract registry
scan-visible-claims:
	bash scripts/scan-visible-claims.sh

## spec-gen: Generate reference documentation in docs/specs/generated/
spec-gen:
	bash scripts/gen-specs.sh

## fixture-sql: Generate complete.sql.xz from JSON fixture data (requires Docker)
fixture-sql:
	bash scripts/gen-fixture-sql.sh

## fixture-json: Re-extract JSON fixture data from a live database (requires DATABASE_URL)
fixture-json:
	cd tools/samplesql && go run . --format json --output-dir ../../common/src/main/resources/data/tables

## help: List all available targets
help:
	@ESSENTIAL="api-generate build-full dev help lint test-image-run test-full test-quick test-standard web-schema-sync"; \
	echo ""; \
	echo "Usage: make <target>"; \
	echo ""; \
	echo "Essential targets:"; \
	echo ""; \
	grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			for e in $$ESSENTIAL; do \
				if [ "$$target" = "$$e" ]; then \
					printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
					break; \
				fi; \
			done; \
		done; \
	echo ""; \
	echo "All targets:"; \
	echo ""; \
	grep -hE '^## [a-z]' $(MAKEFILE_LIST) | sed 's/## //' | sort -t: -k1,1 | \
		while IFS=: read -r target desc; do \
			SKIP=false; \
			for e in $$ESSENTIAL; do \
				if [ "$$target" = "$$e" ]; then SKIP=true; break; fi; \
			done; \
			if [ "$$SKIP" = "false" ]; then \
				printf "  %-24s %s\n" "$$target" "$$desc"; \
			fi; \
		done

content.content:
1→import { create } from 'zustand'
     2→import { graphql } from 'gql.tada'
     3→import { urqlClient } from '@/lib/urqlClient'
     4→
     5→const SavedSearchesQuery = graphql(`
     6→  query SavedSearches {
     7→    savedSearches {
     8→      id
     9→      name
    10→      searchState
    11→      createdAt
    12→      updatedAt
    13→    }
    14→  }
    15→`)
    16→
    17→const SaveSearchMutation = graphql(`
    18→  mutation SaveSearch($input: SaveSearchInput!) {
    19→    saveSearch(input: $input) {
    20→      id
    21→      name
    22→      searchState
    23→      createdAt
    24→      updatedAt
    25→    }
    26→  }
    27→`)
    28→
    29→const DeleteSavedSearchMutation = graphql(`
    30→  mutation DeleteSavedSearch($id: String!) {
    31→    deleteSavedSearch(id: $id)
    32→  }
    33→`)
    34→
    35→export interface SavedSearchItem {
    36→  id: string
    37→  name: string
    38→  searchState: string
    39→  createdAt: string
    40→  updatedAt: string
    41→}
    42→
    43→interface SavedSearchState {
    44→  searches: SavedSearchItem[]
    45→  loaded: boolean
    46→  loading: boolean
    47→
    48→  load: () => Promise<void>
    49→  save: (name: string, searchState: string) => Promise<SavedSearchItem | null>
    50→  remove: (id: string) => Promise<boolean>
    51→  clear: () => void
    52→}
    53→
    54→export const useSavedSearchStore = create<SavedSearchState>()((set, get) => ({
    55→  searches: [],
    56→  loaded: false,
    57→  loading: false,
    58→
    59→  load: async () => {
    60→    if (get().loaded || get().loading) return
    61→    set({ loading: true })
    62→    try {
    63→      const result = await urqlClient
    64→        .query<{ savedSearches: SavedSearchItem[] }>(SavedSearchesQuery, {})
    65→        .toPromise()
    66→      if (result.data?.savedSearches) {
    67→        set({ searches: result.data.savedSearches, loaded: true })
    68→      }
    69→    } finally {
    70→      set({ loading: false })
    71→    }
    72→  },
    73→
    74→  save: async (name, searchState) => {
    75→    const result = await urqlClient
    76→      .mutation<{ saveSearch: SavedSearchItem }>(SaveSearchMutation, {
    77→        input: { name, searchState },
    78→      })
    79→      .toPromise()
    80→    const saved = result.data?.saveSearch ?? null
    81→    if (saved) {
    82→      set((state) => ({ searches: [saved, ...state.searches] }))
    83→    }
    84→    return saved
    85→  },
    86→
    87→  remove: async (id) => {
    88→    const result = await urqlClient
    89→      .mutation<{ deleteSavedSearch: boolean }>(DeleteSavedSearchMutation, { id })
    90→      .toPromise()
    91→    if (result.data?.deleteSavedSearch) {
    92→      set((state) => ({ searches: state.searches.filter((s) => s.id !== id) }))
    93→      return true
    94→    }
    95→    return false
    96→  },
    97→
    98→  clear: () => {
    99→    set({ searches: [], loaded: false, loading: false })
   100→  },
   101→}))
   102→

1→import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
     2→import { Popover, TextInput, Group, Text, Tooltip, Stack, ActionIcon } from '@mantine/core'
     3→import { Bookmark } from 'lucide-react'
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
     5→import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore'
     6→import { useSavedSearchStore } from '@/stores/savedSearchStore'
     7→
     8→interface SaveSearchButtonProps {
     9→  searchParams: URLSearchParams
    10→}
    11→
    12→export function SaveSearchButton({ searchParams }: SaveSearchButtonProps) {
    13→  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user)
    14→  const save = useSavedSearchStore((s) => s.save)
    15→  const [opened, setOpened] = useState(false)
    16→  const [name, setName] = useState('')
    17→  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false)
    18→  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState<{ type: 'success' | 'error'; message: string } | null>(
    19→    null,
    20→  )
    21→
    22→  const handleSave = useCallback(async () => {
    23→    if (!name.trim()) return
    24→    setSaving(true)
    25→    setFeedback(null)
    26→
    27→    // Strip pagination params — not useful when restoring
    28→    const params = new URLSearchParams(searchParams)
    29→    params.delete('page')
    30→    params.delete('pageSize')
    31→    const searchState = params.toString()
    32→
    33→    const result = await save(name.trim(), searchState)
    34→    setSaving(false)
    35→
    36→    if (result) {
    37→      setFeedback({ type: 'success', message: 'Saved!' })
    38→      setTimeout(() => {
    39→        setOpened(false)
    40→        setName('')
    41→        setFeedback(null)
    42→      }, 1000)
    43→    } else {
    44→      setFeedback({ type: 'error', message: 'Failed to save.' })
    45→    }
    46→  }, [name, searchParams, save])
    47→
    48→  if (!user) {
    49→    return (
    50→      <Tooltip label="Sign in to save searches">
    51→        <ActionIcon variant="outline" size="sm" disabled aria-label="Save search">
    52→          <Bookmark size={14} />
    53→        </ActionIcon>
    54→      </Tooltip>
    55→    )
    56→  }
    57→
    58→  return (
    59→    <Popover opened={opened} onChange={setOpened} position="bottom-end" shadow="md" width={280}>
    60→      <Popover.Target>
    61→        <Button
    62→          variant="outline"
    63→          size="xs"
    64→          leftSection={<Bookmark size={14} />}
    65→          onClick={() => setOpened((o) => !o)}
    66→        >
    67→          Save
    68→        </Button>
    69→      </Popover.Target>
    70→      <Popover.Dropdown>
    71→        <Stack gap="xs">
    72→          <TextInput
    73→            label="Search name"
    74→            placeholder="e.g. Top engineering schools"
    75→            value={name}
    76→            onChange={(e) => setName(e.currentTarget.value)}
    77→            maxLength={255}
    78→            onKeyDown={(e) => {
    79→              if (e.key === 'Enter') void handleSave()
    80→            }}
    81→            data-autofocus
    82→          />
    83→          {feedback && (
    84→            <Text size="xs" c={feedback.type === 'success' ? 'green' : 'red'}>
    85→              {feedback.message}
    86→            </Text>
    87→          )}
    88→          <Group justify="flex-end">
    89→            <Button variant="outline" size="xs" onClick={() => setOpened(false)}>
    90→              Cancel
    91→            </Button>
    92→            <Button
    93→              size="xs"
    94→              onClick={() => void handleSave()}
    95→              disabled={!name.trim() || saving}
    96→            >
    97→              {saving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}
    98→            </Button>
    99→          </Group>
   100→        </Stack>
   101→      </Popover.Dropdown>
   102→    </Popover>
   103→  )
   104→}
   105→

content.text: Now let me also check the SavedSearchesDrawer and the search index.ts to understand exports.

1→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     2→import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
     3→import { Drawer, Stack, Group, Text, ActionIcon, Loader } from '@mantine/core'
     4→import { Trash2, ExternalLink } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import { useSavedSearchStore } from '@/stores/savedSearchStore'
     6→
     7→interface SavedSearchesDrawerProps {
     8→  opened: boolean
     9→  onClose: () => void
    10→}
    11→
    12→export function SavedSearchesDrawer({ opened, onClose }: SavedSearchesDrawerProps) {
    13→  const navigate = useNavigate()
    14→  const searches = useSavedSearchStore((s) => s.searches)
    15→  const loaded = useSavedSearchStore((s) => s.loaded)
    16→  const loading = useSavedSearchStore((s) => s.loading)
    17→  const load = useSavedSearchStore((s) => s.load)
    18→  const remove = useSavedSearchStore((s) => s.remove)
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    if (opened) void load()
    22→  }, [opened, load])
    23→
    24→  const handleRestore = (searchState: string) => {
    25→    void navigate(`/search?${searchState}`)
    26→    onClose()
    27→  }
    28→
    29→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    30→    await remove(id)
    31→  }
    32→
    33→  return (
    34→    <Drawer
    35→      opened={opened}
    36→      onClose={onClose}
    37→      title="Saved Searches"
    38→      position="right"
    39→      size="sm"
    40→    >
    41→      {loading && !loaded ? (
    42→        <Stack align="center" py="xl">
    43→          <Loader size="sm" />
    44→        </Stack>
    45→      ) : searches.length === 0 ? (
    46→        <Text c="dimmed" size="sm" py="xl" ta="center">
    47→          No saved searches yet. Use the Save button on the search page to save your current
    48→          search.
    49→        </Text>
    50→      ) : (
    51→        <Stack gap="xs">
    52→          {searches.map((ss) => (
    53→            <Group
    54→              key={ss.id}
    55→              justify="space-between"
    56→              p="sm"
    57→              style={{
    58→                borderRadius: 'var(--mantine-radius-sm)',
    59→                border: '1px solid var(--mantine-color-gray-3)',
    60→                cursor: 'pointer',
    61→              }}
    62→              onClick={() => handleRestore(ss.searchState)}
    63→            >
    64→              <Stack gap={2} style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
    65→                <Text size="sm" fw={500} truncate>
    66→                  {ss.name}
    67→                </Text>
    68→                <Text size="xs" c="dimmed">
    69→                  {new Date(ss.updatedAt).toLocaleDateString()}
    70→                </Text>
    71→              </Stack>
    72→              <Group gap="xs">
    73→                <ActionIcon
    74→                  variant="subtle"
    75→                  size="sm"
    76→                  c="dimmed"
    77→                  aria-label="Restore search"
    78→                  onClick={(e) => {
    79→                    e.stopPropagation()
    80→                    handleRestore(ss.searchState)
    81→                  }}
    82→                >
    83→                  <ExternalLink size={14} />
    84→                </ActionIcon>
    85→                <ActionIcon
    86→                  variant="subtle"
    87→                  size="sm"
    88→                  c="red"
    89→                  aria-label="Delete saved search"
    90→                  onClick={(e) => {
    91→                    e.stopPropagation()
    92→                    void handleDelete(ss.id)
    93→                  }}
    94→                >
    95→                  <Trash2 size={14} />
    96→                </ActionIcon>
    97→              </Group>
    98→            </Group>
    99→          ))}
   100→        </Stack>
   101→      )}
   102→    </Drawer>
   103→  )
   104→}
   105→

1→export type {
     2→  SearchField,

import { Menu, Avatar, Group, Text } from '@mantine/core'
import { useDisclosure } from '@mantine/hooks'
import { Bookmark, Settings } from 'lucide-react'
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore'
import { PreferencesModal } from './PreferencesModal'

export function UserMenu() {
  const navigate = useNavigate()
  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user)
  const signOut = useAuthStore((s) => s.signOut)
  const [prefsOpened, { open: openPrefs, close: closePrefs }] = useDisclosure(false)

  if (!user) return null

  const fullName = user.user_metadata?.full_name as string | undefined
  const avatarUrl = user.user_metadata?.avatar_url as string | undefined
  const displayName = fullName ?? user.email ?? ''
  const initials = displayName
    .split(' ')
    .map((w) => w[0])
    .join('')
    .slice(0, 2)
    .toUpperCase()

  return (
    <>
      <Menu shadow="md" width={200}>
        <Menu.Target>
          <Group gap="xs" style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}>
            <Avatar src={avatarUrl} alt={displayName} radius="xl" size="sm" color="accent">
              {initials}
            </Avatar>
          </Group>
        </Menu.Target>
        <Menu.Dropdown>
          <Menu.Label>
            <Text size="sm" fw={500} truncate>
              {displayName}
            </Text>
            {user.email && (
              <Text size="xs" c="dimmed" truncate>
                {user.email}
              </Text>
            )}
          </Menu.Label>
          <Menu.Divider />
          <Menu.Item
            leftSection={<Bookmark size={14} />}
            onClick={() => void navigate('/search?showSaved=1')}
          >
            Saved Searches
          </Menu.Item>
          <Menu.Item leftSection={<Settings size={14} />} onClick={openPrefs}>
            Preferences
          </Menu.Item>
          <Menu.Item c="red" onClick={() => void signOut()}>
            Sign out
          </Menu.Item>
        </Menu.Dropdown>
      </Menu>
      <PreferencesModal opened={prefsOpened} onClose={closePrefs} />
    </>
  )
}

import { Menu, Avatar, Group, Text } from '@mantine/core'
import { useDisclosure } from '@mantine/hooks'
import { Bookmark, Heart, Settings } from 'lucide-react'
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'
import { useAuthStore } from '@/stores/authStore'
import { PreferencesModal } from './PreferencesModal'

export function UserMenu() {
  const navigate = useNavigate()
  const user = useAuthStore((s) => s.user)
  const signOut = useAuthStore((s) => s.signOut)
  const [prefsOpened, { open: openPrefs, close: closePrefs }] = useDisclosure(false)

  if (!user) return null

  const fullName = user.user_metadata?.full_name as string | undefined
  const avatarUrl = user.user_metadata?.avatar_url as string | undefined
  const displayName = fullName ?? user.email ?? ''
  const initials = displayName
    .split(' ')
    .map((w) => w[0])
    .join('')
    .slice(0, 2)
    .toUpperCase()

  return (
    <>
      <Menu shadow="md" width={200}>
        <Menu.Target>
          <Group gap="xs" style={{ cursor: 'pointer' }}>
            <Avatar src={avatarUrl} alt={displayName} radius="xl" size="sm" color="accent">
              {initials}
            </Avatar>
          </Group>
        </Menu.Target>
        <Menu.Dropdown>
          <Menu.Label>
            <Text size="sm" fw={500} truncate>
              {displayName}
            </Text>
            {user.email && (
              <Text size="xs" c="dimmed" truncate>
                {user.email}
              </Text>
            )}
          </Menu.Label>
          <Menu.Divider />
          <Menu.Item
            leftSection={<Bookmark size={14} />}
            onClick={() => void navigate('/search?showSaved=1')}
          >
            Saved Searches
          </Menu.Item>
          <Menu.Item leftSection={<Settings size={14} />} onClick={openPrefs}>
            Preferences
          </Menu.Item>
          <Menu.Item c="red" onClick={() => void signOut()}>
            Sign out
          </Menu.Item>
        </Menu.Dropdown>
      </Menu>
      <PreferencesModal opened={prefsOpened} onClose={closePrefs} />
    </>
  )
}

    54→// ── Constants ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    55→

    63→
    64→// ── GraphQL queries ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    65→
    66→const SearchFieldsQuery = graphql(`
    67→  query SearchFields {
    68→    searchFields {
    69→      __typename
    70→      name
    71→      label
    72→      description
    73→      theme
    74→      visibility
    75→      searchability

    77→      dataSourceID
    78→      ... on ChoiceSearchField {
    79→        options {

    83→        minSelections

    85→      }
    86→      ... on NumericalSearchField {
    87→        min
    88→        max
    89→        step
    90→        unit
    91→        defaultValue
    92→      }
    93→      ... on NumericalRangeSearchField {
    94→        min
    95→        max
    96→        step
    97→        unit
    98→        defaultLower
    99→        defaultUpper
   100→      }
   101→      ... on GeoSearchField {
   102→        defaultLatitude

   104→        maxRadiusMiles
   105→      }
   106→    }
   107→  }
   108→`)
   109→
   110→const SearchOutputFieldsQuery = graphql(`
   111→  query SearchOutputFields {
   112→    searchOutputFields {
   113→      name
   114→      label
   115→      theme
   116→      defaultVisible
   117→      exportable
   118→      dataSourceID

   126→const SearchQuery = graphql(`
   127→  query Search($filters: [FilterInput!], $limit: Int, $offset: Int, $sort: SortInput, $userLocation: UserLocation, $rankingBlend: [RankingBlendWeight!]) {
   128→    search(filters: $filters, limit: $limit, offset: $offset, sort: $sort, userLocation: $userLocation, rankingBlend: $rankingBlend) {
   129→      results {
   130→        unitID
   131→        name
